trigger: Agent calls composio.create(userId) to open a new session

trigger: Agent calls composio.create(userId) to open a new session

trigger: User opens a Connect Link to authorize a toolkit

trigger: User opens a Connect Link to authorize a toolkit

trigger: Agent calls tools.execute(slug, params) for a known action
